purpose: Accept natural language commands via HTTP webhook and translate them to existing API actions using Grok 4, eliminating the need for SSH-based config changes.
design_intent: The webhook is a thin translation layer only. It classifies intent then dispatches to already-validated API endpoints. It adds no new execution paths — if an intent maps to a forbidden action, the existing endpoint rejects it.
change_impact: Adds POST /api/nl-command. No changes to existing endpoints or scheduler logic.

model.note: Same API key as advisor. Shares XAI_API_KEY env var.

new_endpoint.intent: Parse a natural language instruction and dispatch to an existing API endpoint.
new_endpoint.auth: Same bearer token / CORS rules as other /api/* routes.

body.dry_run: boolean (optional, default false) — if true, return intended_action without executing

response_success.result: object — response from the dispatched endpoint

response_error.400: Malformed body or missing message field
response_error.503: XAI_API_KEY absent or model call failed

supported_intents.guard: MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ENABLED must be true; reject with 422 otherwise

supported_intents.extraction: Grok 4 must extract numeric value; if ambiguous return 422

supported_intents.note: Aggregates responses and returns AI-generated plain-text summary in result.summary field. No mutations.

classification_prompt.role: You are a command parser for a forum automation bot. Classify the user's instruction into one of the supported intents and extract any numeric parameters. Return a JSON object only.

output_schema.intent: one of the supported intent codes or 'unknown'
output_schema.extracted_params: object with any numeric values extracted (e.g. { intervalMinutes: 45 })

env_additions.effect: Kill-switch for the /api/nl-command endpoint. Returns 503 when false.
If set, requests must include Authorization: Bearer <NL_WEBHOOK_SECRET>. Recommended for any external exposure.

safety_constraints: Extracted numeric params are validated against existing endpoint schemas before dispatch.
force_publish intent requires MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ENABLED=true — otherwise return 422 with reason.
status_query is always safe (read-only) — no guard needed.
dry_run=true returns intended_action without calling any downstream endpoint.
Source field is logged for audit but never influences dispatch logic.

telegram_adapter_note.description: Optional: a thin Telegram bot (node-telegram-bot-api) that forwards messages to POST /api/nl-command. Out of scope for sprint plan but architecturally trivial — adapter is ~30 lines.
telegram_adapter_note.scope: Not included in Sprint 3. Can be added as Sprint 4 if needed.
